Crop Name: rice

Profile
- Season type: short-season (TSUM total=1600 C.d)
- Temperature adaptation: temperate-adapted (TBASEM=8.00 C)
- Development driver: temperature only (IDSL=0, DLO=14.00 h)
- Root/water trait: shallow-rooted, moderately drought-tolerant (RDMCR=80.00 cm, DEPNR=3.50)
- Assimilation trait: moderate assimilation potential (AMAX peak=40.00)
- Storage allocation: early storage allocation (FOTB onset DVS=0.90)

Nutrient capacity proxies (leaf maxima)
- NMAXLV: DVS0=0.0600, DVS1=0.0200
- PMAXLV: DVS0=0.0090, DVS1=0.0030
- KMAXLV: DVS0=0.1200, DVS1=0.0400

Use guidance
- Treat this as prior knowledge for zero-shot policy transfer.
- Final action should still adapt to current weather/soil observations.
